meanings.definition: be attached; be in contact with

examples: The spider's thread attached to the window sill
The grandparents want to bond with the child

meanings.definition: take temporary possession of as a security, by legal authority
examples: The customs agents impounded the illegal shipment
The police confiscated the stolen artwork
all art schools whether independent or attached to universities

meanings.definition: used of buildings joined by common sidewalls
associated in an exclusive sexual relationship

examples: she was very attached to her father
